stories.title: Phase 1: Foundation & Health Check
acceptanceCriteria: Directory structure exists: lua/pkm, plugin, doc
lua/pkm/init.lua implements a metatable-based lazy-loading module (Snacks pattern) and exposes a setup(opts) function
lua/pkm/health.lua implements a health check that verifies the 'pkm' CLI executable is in the user's $PATH
Basic user configuration structure is defined and merges correctly with user opts

stories.title: Phase 2: Async CLI Bridge & Error Recovery
acceptanceCriteria: lua/pkm/cli.lua exists and uses vim.system for asynchronous command execution
CLI wrapper integrates with fidget.nvim or vim.notify for progress spinners (Saving..., Saved)
CLI wrapper implements Active Recovery: on non-zero exit code, it captures stderr
CLI wrapper exposes methods for core pkm commands: daily add, note add, search, tags search, note links

stories.title: Phase 3: Zero-Latency Scratch Buffer Capture
acceptanceCriteria: lua/pkm/capture.lua exists and can open a floating/split scratch buffer
Saving/closing the buffer triggers an async call to cli.lua to write the content via pkm CLI
If async save fails, capture.lua automatically re-opens the scratch buffer with the drafted content and displays the error (Active Recovery)

stories.title: Phase 4: Picker & Keymap Integration
acceptanceCriteria: plugin/pkm.lua exposes a :Pkm command and registers <LocalLeader>p... default keymaps
lua/pkm/picker.lua implements a Snacks.picker adapter for pkm search results, tags, and backlinks
Selecting an item in the picker opens the markdown file natively in Neovim
Optimistic Cache: Newly captured notes instantly appear in picker results without waiting for full index rebuilds
